Mighty Slice Caramelised Biscuit High Protein Cheesecake 115g

£2.80

Product Information

Indulgent high protein cheesecake with a caramelised biscuit base. A guilt-free treat packed with protein.

Ingredients

Quark (Milk), Biscuit Base (Wheat Flour, Sugar, Palm Oil), Caramel (Sugar, Butter (Milk)), Whey Protein (Milk)

Nutritional Data

Typical valuesPer 100g
Energy820kJ/196kcal
Fat7.5g
Saturates3.8g
Carbohydrate17g
Sugars14g
Protein15g
Salt0.4g
